summary: Comprehensive testing of Mobile PWA for School Management System. All mobile routes (/m/*) working correctly. Role-based dashboards (Admin, Teacher, Parent) render correctly. Bottom navigation with orange highlight working. Auto-redirect from desktop routes to /m for mobile viewport working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mobile PWA fully functional. All /m/* routes working. Stripe payments and email notifications are MOCKED on backend.

features_tested.admin_login_mobile_redirect: PASS - Admin login redirects to /m on mobile viewport
features_tested.admin_dashboard: PASS - Shows stats (10 Students, 3 Staff, ₹30,000 Collection, ₹124k Pending Dues, 0 Overdue)
features_tested.admin_bottom_nav: PASS - 5 tabs (Home, Students, Fees, Attendance, More)
features_tested.admin_students_screen: PASS - Shows 10 enrolled students with search functionality
features_tested.admin_fees_screen: PASS - Shows Due Chart with 3 students, ₹124,000 total pending
features_tested.admin_attendance_screen: PASS - Class chips (Nursery, LKG, UKG, etc.), section selection, student list with P/A/L buttons
features_tested.admin_marks_screen: PASS - Shows 2 exams (Test Exam March 2026, Term 1 🔒)
features_tested.admin_more_screen: PASS - Profile card, menu grid, Switch to Desktop, Sign Out buttons
features_tested.teacher_dashboard: PASS - Shows 'Mark Attendance' CTA, 17 classes assigned, My Classes list
features_tested.teacher_bottom_nav: PASS - 5 tabs (Home, Attendance, Marks, Messages, More)
features_tested.teacher_attendance_screen: PASS - Class chips for attendance marking
features_tested.parent_dashboard: PASS - Fee status (All Clear), Quick Access, Announcements
features_tested.parent_bottom_nav: PASS - 5 tabs (Home, Fees, Messages, Notices, More)
features_tested.bottom_nav_orange_highlight: PASS - Active tab has orange color (#E88A1A / rgb(232, 138, 26))
features_tested.mobile_auto_redirect: PASS - Navigating to /dashboard redirects to /m when viewport < 768px
features_tested.attendance_class_section_flow: PASS - Class chip → Section chip → Student list with attendance buttons

mocked_apis.stripe_payments: MOCKED - POST /api/fees/pay uses mocked payment processing
